de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class VariableConditionAdapter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.VariableConditionAdapter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariableCondition
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractOrInterfaceType, AlternativeVariableCondition, ArrayComponentTypeCondition, ArrayLengthCondition, ArrayTypeCondition, ConstantCondition, ContainsAssignmentCondition, DifferentFields, DifferentInstantiationCondition, EnumConstantCondition, EnumTypeCondition, FinalReferenceCondition, FreeLabelInVariableCondition, IsThisReference, LocalVariableCondition, MayExpandMethodCondition, MetaDisjointCondition, StaticFieldCondition, StaticMethodCondition, StaticReferenceCondition, SubFormulaCondition, TermLabelCondition, TypeComparisonCondition, TypeCondition

    public abstract class VariableConditionAdapter
extends java.lang.Object
implements VariableCondition
    The variable condition adapter can be used by variable conditions which can either fail or be successful, but which do not create a constraint.

      MatchConditions check(SchemaVariable var, SVSubstitute instCandidate, MatchConditions mc, Services services)
      checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled

      checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled

        public VariableConditionAdapter()

    • Method Detail

      • check

        public abstract boolean check(SchemaVariable var,
                              SVSubstitute instCandidate,
                              SVInstantiations instMap,
                              Services services)
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Parameters:
        var - the template Variable to be instantiated
        instMap - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        true iff condition is fulfilled

      • check

        public final MatchConditions check(SchemaVariable var,
                                   SVSubstitute instCandidate,
                                   MatchConditions mc,
                                   Services services)
        Description copied from interface: VariableCondition
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Specified by:
        check in interface VariableCondition
        Parameters:
        var - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
        instCandidate - the SVSubstitute (e.g. Term, ProgramElement) to be mapped to var
        mc - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        modified match results if the condition can be satisfied, or null otherwise
